title: Solute
description: A simple mod made which expands on vanilla with a broad range of QOL features.
body:
# Solute Collection Solute will not be updated anymore after 1.21.11, its features will be split off into separate mods which you can find in the [Solute Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/jtGdGtwt). --- ![Solute banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa4d4af55c94be1afbde988ade6343b8494c1579_0.webp)
Solute was started as a mod to add small QOL features for my own SMP. This slowly grew out to a full on vanilla plus mod that can be used on its own to improve the base game by just a nudge, while still allowing players to connect with vanilla clients.

## Modules The mod is split up in modules which can all be turned on and off on demand from in-game and/or a config file. A few of the prominent modules are: - **[Bed](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/#bed)** speed up time when sleeping and show the day count - **[Copper Golem](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/#copper-golem)** golems can put music discs in jukeboxes - **[Ladder](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/#ladder)** ladders can be supported from above - **[Lava](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/#lava)** cobblestone generators generate different blocks based on their biome and height - **[Purpur](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/#purpur)** redstone powered purpur blocks become elevators ~~For all modules, read the [docs](https://docs.hexasis.eu/mods/solute/)~~ ## Videos > 1.12.0+1.21.10 update ## ~~Solute Extras~~ ~~Solute also has a _sister_ mod with some less-balanced but fun features called [Solute Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/solute-extras)~~
